description: Canonical splice demos — donor dissection → splice plan → carrier compile. Used by make splice-demo, verify-splice, and CI.

maturity_tiers.S1_plan: Splice plan + reusable blocks + evidence gates (no KiCad compile required)
maturity_tiers.S2_compile: S1 + DRC-clean carrier board via splice-build
maturity_tiers.S3_bench: S2 + bring-up card + measured evidence gates closed (operator)

cases.title: RC toy motor stage → robot drive base
cases.product_story: Dissect dual H-bridge donor section, keep motor harnesses, compile ESP32 carrier for differential drive.

cases.title: RC toy donor — vision evidence + bench closure
cases.product_story: Junk board photo path (offline board_evidence) → splice compile → bench capture closes power-on gates.

cases.title: Repair-café RC donor — symptoms + PSU ramp gates + bench closure
cases.product_story: repair_intake symptoms, board_evidence, synthetic donor photo, Rossmann-style PSU/thermal gates → golden loop.

cases.title: Inkjet printer motion → plotter motion stage
cases.product_story: Salvage stepper driver section and limit harness from printer electronics; compile motion-controller carrier.
